buildReminders.text: Pre-Lv 14: clear with Spark + Orb of Storms (Entangle alone is too weak before 14).
Act I active engrave priority: Spark > Orb of Storms > Volcano > Entangle.
Lv 14: socket Thunderstorm. Combo = Entangle + Thunderstorm (Thunderstorm "waters" the plants).
Act II active engrave priority: add Thunderstorm.
Lv 31: socket Thrashing Vines for single-target. Link Heft + Considered Casting.
Act III active engrave priority: add Thrashing Vines (asset name: Awakened Forest).
Act I support engrave priority: Unleash > Faster Cast > Controlled Destruction.
Act II support engrave priority: add Explosive Growth + Living Lightning.
Core support for Entangle/Thunderstorm combo: Accelerated Growth.
Living Lightning extracts Impale stacks from your spells (pairs with Cut to the Bone passive area).
Endgame: Shock Conduction I on Thunderstorm — generates Mana Remnants for sustain.
Act I spirit engrave: Arctic Armour.
Act II spirit engrave: add Barkskin (extra armor while you stack ES).
Act III spirit engrave: add Attrition.
Cap Fire / Cold / Lightning resistance at 75%.
Vendor priorities: +Physical Spell / +Spell Skill gem levels on Staff, Wand, Amulet, Focus.
Passive keystone: Wildsurge Incantation — required for Entangle / Thrashing Vines damage.
Passive priority: Plant nodes — Boundless Growth, Constricting (% damage).
Passive priority: Cut to the Bone area — Armour Break is a massive damage multiplier (pairs with Living Lightning for impale).
Clear: spam Entangle, drop Thunderstorm on top.
Single target: Sigil of Power → Kelari's Brutality → stack Entangle → keep Thrashing Vines up → water with Thunderstorm.
Map gear: Staff +Physical/Spell gem levels, Focus +1 (or +2) Spell Skill, Rings cast speed, Body Armor max ES.
CI (Chaos Inoculation) respec: only after stacking ES on gear. Grab Abasement + Shimmering Mirage to avoid stun/ailment penalties.
Uniques to chase: Bushwhack (Pin defense), Idol of Uldurn (clear + ST), Headhunter endgame.
